about.title: About ToraSEO

settings.title: Settings
settings.comingSoon: Coming soon — settings will live here:

comingSoonItems.configPath: Manual path to Claude Desktop config.json

language.title: Language settings
language.label: Interface language
language.hint: The change applies immediately. Dialogs from the OS (e.g. file picker) keep using your system language.

unsaved.title: You have unsaved changes
unsaved.body: If you go back now, your changes will be lost.

modeSelection.question: What would you like to check?
modeSelection.claudeOptional: Connection to Claude Desktop is optional

siteAudit.enterUrl: Enter a site URL in the sidebar

sitemap.label: Sitemap
sitemap.tooltip: Sitemap discovery and indexed pages list

onboarding.lockedSidebar:
Finish the setup on the right
to continue
onboarding.title: ToraSEO works in tandem with Claude Desktop
onboarding.subtitle: Three components are required to run. When all three are green, scanning unlocks automatically.

claude.label: Claude Desktop is running
claude.openFailedFallback: Could not open Claude Desktop. Launch it manually.

mcp.label: ToraSEO MCP server is connected
mcp.hintMissing: The ToraSEO installer adds MCP automatically. If your config lives in a non-standard location, point us to it manually.
mcp.errorParse: The file is not valid JSON. Open it in an editor and check the format.
mcp.infoNoToraseoYet: File selected, but the mcpServers.toraseo entry is not there yet. The ToraSEO installer will add it next time.

skill.label: ToraSEO Skill is installed
skill.hintMissing: Download the ZIP from GitHub and install it via Claude Desktop: Settings → Skills → Install ZIP. Then click "I installed Skill".
skill.errorNoRelease: No skill release found on GitHub. Open the releases page manually.
skill.infoDownloaded: ZIP downloaded ({{tag}}). The folder with the file is open — drag it into Claude Desktop: Settings → Skills → Install from ZIP. After installing, return here and click "I installed Skill".
skill.confirmDialog:
Confirm that the ToraSEO Skill is installed in Claude Desktop via Settings → Skills?

Without the Skill loaded into Claude's context, the analysis will be incomplete — it will ignore CRAWLING_POLICY, verdict mapping, and the CGS scoring formula.
skill.tooltipFilesystem: Skill is detected via the filesystem (Claude Code) — no confirmation needed
skill.tooltipManual: Manual confirmation already active — reset it below to confirm again

preflight.depsFailed: Dependency check failed. Open Claude Desktop, make sure MCP is connected and the Skill is installed.

downloaded.title: Update ready
downloaded.body: ToraSEO {{version}} downloaded. The app will restart to install.

check.found: Update found: {{version}}. See the notification in the corner.

updater.installerCallout: Important: a fresh install (running the .exe directly) shows a regular installer.
